subcodes.first_line: O Furugh! I have no time whatsoever, yet Jinab-i-Basar hath earnestly requested this letter. Therefore, I have no choice but to take up my pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فروغ فرصت ابدا ندارم و جناب بصار خواهش این تحریر نموده اند چاره جز قلم زدن
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love of God
